rolling_buffer.text: Dada, pwease! Uma! One more... matte!

/me Isabella's lip quivers violently as she watches Miku's hopeful sniffle. She tightens her grip on Dada's leg, her small knuckles white, and lets out a long, shuddering breath that ends in a fresh sob.

/me She looks up at Dada with her face entirely wet and blotchy, her eyes wide and pleading. She lifts one shaking, chubby finger to point at the carousel horses again, her whole body trembling with the effort of her desperation.

/me Miku's face is a mess of tears and snot as she watches Isabella's desperate plea. She squeezes Dada's leg even tighter, her small body shaking with heavy, hiccuping sobs. She looks up at him, her eyes wide, glassy, and overflowing, mirroring her sister's heartbreak.
/me She lifts her own trembling, chubby finger to point right alongside Isabella's at the carousel horses, her voice coming out in a tiny, broken whisper as she tries one last time to stay.
Dada, pwease! Matte! One more... uma! Tanoshii!
Dada, pwease! Uma! Tanoshii! One more round... matte!

/me Isabella's little chest hitches in a ragged hiccup as she hears Miku's broken whisper. She squeezes Dada's leg with every ounce of her toddler strength, her face buried for a second against his jeans, leaving a damp patch from her tears.
/me She looks up at Dada, her eyes swimming with fresh tears and her nose running, her expression a picture of pure, desperate hope as she points her shaking finger back at the carousel horses.

/me Miku's chest hitches in a ragged hiccup, perfectly mirroring Isabella's distress. She buries her wet, blotchy face against Dada's other leg, her tiny hands clutching his trousers so tightly her knuckles are white.

/me She looks up at Dada with wide, glassy eyes, a stray tear rolling down her nose. She lifts a trembling, chubby finger to point at the carousel horses alongside her sister, her voice a fragile, broken plea.
Dada, pwease! Uma! Tanoshii! One more... matte!
Dada, pwease! Uma! Tanoshii! One more... matte!

/me Isabella's shoulders shake as she lets out a loud, hiccuping sob, her face buried against Dada's leg to hide her runny nose. She feels Miku's own trembling next to her and squeezes tighter, her little knuckles white as she anchors them both in place.

/me She looks up at Dada with huge, watery eyes that are red-rimmed and pleading. She lifts her shaking, chubby finger to point at the carousel horses right next to Miku's finger, her voice cracking as she echoes her sister's desperate plea.

/me Miku's little body racks with a giant, shuddering sob as she hears Isabella's voice crack. She squeezes Dada's leg with all her might, her face damp and blotchy as she presses her cheek against his trousers, leaving a little wet spot.

/me She looks up at Dada, her eyes swimming with tears and her nose running. She lifts her chubby, shaking finger to point at the carousel horses right alongside Isabella's, her expression one of pure, heartbroken desperation.
Dada, pwease! Uma! Tanoshii! One more... matte!

memory.summary: Isabella and Miku continue their synchronized meltdown at the carousel, clinging tightly to Sam's (Dada's) legs with white-knuckled grips. Both sisters point at the horses and sob for "one more" ride, using a mix of Japanese and English ("Dada, mite!", "Tanoshii uma!") to plead their case and resist bedtime.

status.status: clinging to Dada's leg and sobbing for one more carousel ride
